sanskrit:
यदृच्छया चोपपन्नं स्वर्गद्वारमपावृतम्।
सुखिनः क्षत्रियाः पार्थ लभन्ते युद्धमीदृशम्॥
transliteration: yadṛcchayā copapannaṃ svarga-dvāram apāvṛtam / sukhinaḥ kṣatriyāḥ pārtha labhante yuddham īdṛśam //
literal_meaning: By chance / also / presented / heaven-door / wide-open / happy / warriors / O Pārtha / obtain / war / such
contextual_meaning: A kṣatriya who is offered an unasked-for righteous battle should rejoice, for it is a rare portal to either earthly victory or post-mortem ascent.
psychological_state: Reframing paralysis into privileged action; the psyche moves from threat-appraisal to sacred-opportunity.
trigger_scenario: A paramedic is first on scene at a major accident—initial dread gives way to recognition that their training has prepared them precisely for this moment.
anchor_text: Welcome an unasked righteous battle as a rare gateway to glory or heaven.
